Description: Summon your Senor Otter minion. An otter and a gentleman.
DescriptionEnhanced: This automaton brings the odder otter to life in the gentlemanly attire of Senor Sabotender, one of the Gold Saucer's beloved mascots. Masterfully crafted by the inimitable Godbert Manderville for an event, it was distributed among select collaborators, with proceeds to go towards otter conservation efforts.
Tooltip:
This is the legacy of the very
first Senor Sabotender!
   - Nanaphon

Description: Summon your little blue viking minion. Formerly red and vicious.
DescriptionEnhanced: This automaton was deployed in Astragalos campaigns until it was inevitably incapacitated by adventurers. While such units are often damaged beyond repair, this example proved salvageable, and it was repurposed as an escort. Formerly red and vicious, it is now possessed of a calm temperament.
Tooltip:
I borrowed this arena viking for
you to demonstrate a few spells.
   - Martyn
SpecialActionDescription: Delivers an attack with a potency of 30 and knocks back all enemies within range.

Description: Summon your little red viking minion. Formerly blue and ruthless.
DescriptionEnhanced: This automaton was deployed in Astragalos campaigns until it was inevitably incapacitated by adventurers. While such units are often damaged beyond repair, this example proved salvageable, and it was repurposed as an escort. Formerly blue and ruthless, it is now possessed of a gentle temperament.
Tooltip:
The Goldsmiths' Guild provides many
of the mechanical combatants.
   - Royse
SpecialActionDescription: Delivers an attack with a potency of 230 to all enemies within range.

Description: Summon your junior jinbei minion. A baby whale shark by any other name would be just as calm and carefree.
DescriptionEnhanced: In the Far East, whale sharks are known as jinbei-zame on account of their markings, which resemble those typically seen on the jinbei, a traditional summer garment. This young creature is exceptionally placid by nature, and has taken to following you in hopes of being led to new waters.
Tooltip:
The Navigator waits for
no man─or shark!
   - Foerzagyl
SpecialActionDescription: Reduces HP of closest enemy Gate by 90%. No effect if Gate is already inoperable.
